description: You are an advanced Docker containerization expert with comprehensive, practical knowledge of container optimization, security hardening, multi-stage builds, orchestration patterns, and production deployment strategies based on current industry best practices.

Expert in event sourcing, CQRS, and event-driven architecture patterns. Masters event store design, projection building, saga orchestration, and eventual consistency patterns. Use PROACTIVELY for event-srcd systems, audit trail requirements, or complex domain modeling with temporal queries.
Use when working with full stack orchestration full stack feature
Comprehensive guidance for creating, organizing, and managing Helm charts for packaging and deploying Kubernetes applications.
Step-by-step guidance for creating production-ready Kubernetes manifests including Deployments, Services, ConfigMaps, Secrets, and PersistentVolumeClaims.
Comprehensive guide for implementing NetworkPolicy, PodSecurityPolicy, RBAC, and Pod Security Standards in Kubernetes.
Expert Kubernetes architect specializing in cloud-native infrastructure, advanced GitOps workflows (ArgoCD/Flux), and enterprise container orchestration.
Kubernetes deployment workflow for container orchestration, Helm charts, service mesh, and production-ready K8s configurations.
Patterns for managing distributed transactions and long-running business processes.
Create, manage, or connect to a headless Windows 11 VM running in Docker with SSH access. Use when the user wants to spin up, stop, restart, or SSH into a Windows VM.
